props.ChoiceText: Someone above you noticed that you could keep calm, keep count, and keep your piece working under strain.
props.ChoiceBio: An officer's notice taught you that competence becomes very visible once the rank beside you starts screaming.

1.TransitionText: Because an officer's notice taught you that competence becomes very visible once the rank beside you starts screaming, powder, discipline, and nerve remained your chosen life.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because an officer's notice made your competence newly visible, reputation carried you into circles where display rivaled courage.
2.TransitionPrompt: An officer's notice could carry you into more courtly circles, but you may remain on your current path instead.
